name: What are the fastest fixes for voice search near me?
description: Update your business profile, hours, reviews, and FAQs first. Those are usually the quickest improvements for local voice visibility.

mainEntity.name: What are the fastest fixes for voice search near me?

acceptedAnswer.text: Usually the fastest wins are your business profile, hours, reviews, and a few clear FAQ sections on your main pages. Those elements tend to feed local answers more reliably than long blog posts with broad topics.
